name: PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk
summary: PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk trades in agriculture and marine products in Indonesia. The company operates through two segments, Sales Agrobisnis Product and Candy. It trades in dried seaweeds, cashew nut, rice, corn, coffee, and soybeans. The company also manufactures and sells candies under various brands. In addition, it engages in the agricultural products, coffee and mining commodities, industrial, transportation, and printing activities; and general contracting business. The company was formerly known as PT Wahana Phonix Mandiri and changed its name to PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk in June 2012. PT Wahana Pronatural Tbk was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Surabaya, Indonesia.
